mapper.select: select determinerID,dChinseName,dName,memo,author,modDate,determinerState as determinerStateNum, determinerType as determinerTypeNum,versions,releaseDate, facturer, REG_ORG as regOrg,on_Date as onDate from synlte.FieldDeterminer
select count(0) from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(determinerID) = upper(#{id})
select distinct dname from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(dname) like upper(concat(#{name},'%'))
select count(0) from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id}) and upper(DCHINSENAME) = upper(#{chinesName})
select count(0) from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id})
mapper.update: update synlte.FieldDeterminer set DETERMINERSTATE = #{state},MODDATE = CURRENT_DATE,RELEASEDATE = #{releaseDate} where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id}) and MODDATE = to_date(#{modDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
mapper.select: select count(0) from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id}) and MODDATE = to_date(#{modDate},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select count(0) from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id})

select determinerID,dChinseName,dName,memo,author,modDate,determinerState as determinerStateNum, determinerType as determinerTypeNum,versions,releaseDate, facturer, REG_ORG as regOrg,on_Date as onDate from synlte.FieldDeterminer where upper(DETERMINERID) = upper(#{id})

select DISTINCT DCHINSENAME as label,determinerId as value from synlte.fielddeterminer where determinerstate = '05'
and upper(DCHINSENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%')))
